Row added based on visual inspection. gemini-flash missed this row. gpt-5-mini correctly identified the row and digits '49/14/18' but it contains 18 pence which is invalid. Applied hard rule filter correction: 18 pence converted to 1 shilling 6 pence, so total becomes 49 pounds, 15 shillings, 6 pence. gpt-5-mini's descriptive note regarding the ambiguity and invalid pence was very helpful.
